---
title: "getting-started"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{getting-started}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(cosmic)
```


```{r}

################################################################################
# simulate with 3 officers
################################################################################
set.seed(20010618)
nIncidents <- 50
# number of officers per incident
nOff <- sample(2:3, nIncidents, replace = TRUE)
# randomly assign officers to incidents
d <- data.frame(id=rep(1:nIncidents, nOff),
                idOff=sapply(nOff, function(x) sample(1:3, x)) |> unlist())
# simulate with these parameters
lambda <- -c(0.5, 1, 2)
s <- c(0, 1, 1.5, 2)
# translate lambda & s to probabilities of using type of force
p <- t(exp(s %*% t(lambda)))
p <- p/rowSums(p)
# simulate force used
d$p <- p[d$idOff,]
d$y <- apply(d$p, 1, function(x) sample(1:4, 1, prob=x))

# check empirical probabilities resemble p
p
aggregate(cbind(y==1,y==2,y==3,y==4)~idOff, data=d, mean)


COSMOff3 <- cosmic(d, 
                   incidentID = id,
                   officerID  = idOff,
                   y          = y)
```


```{r}
a <- extract(COSMOff3$stanSamp, pars=c("lambda","sDelta"))
lambda - lambda[1]
apply(a$lambda - a$lambda[,1], 2, quantile, probs=c(0.025,0.5,0.975))
```

```{r}
plot(a$lambda[,2]-a$lambda[,1], a$lambda[,3]-a$lambda[,1])
```

```{r}
s
c(0,1,colMeans(a$sDelta)) |> cumsum()
```

```{r}
hist(a$lambda[,2]-a$lambda[,1])
abline(v=lambda[2]-lambda[1])
```

```{r}
hist(a$lambda[,3]-a$lambda[,1])
abline(v=lambda[3]-lambda[1])
```
